info.name: Microsoft Azure Azure Key Vault API
info.description:
Azure Key Vault is a cloud service for securely storing and accessing secrets, keys, and certificates. The Key Vault REST API provides programmatic access to manage cryptographic keys, secrets (such as connection strings and passwords), and certificates used by cloud applications and services. Key Vault helps safeguard cryptographic keys and secrets used by applications, while enabling users to maintain control of their keys and reduce latency of cloud applications.

Contact Support:
 Name: Microsoft Azure Support
 Email: azuresupport@microsoft.com

variable.description: (Required) The name for the new key.

request.description: Creates a new key, stores it, then returns key parameters and attributes to the client. The create key operation can be used to create any key type in Azure Key Vault.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The version of the key. Use an empty string to get the latest version.

request.description: Gets the public part of a stored key. The get key operation applies to all key types. If the requested key is symmetric, then no key material is released in the response.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

request.description: The update key operation changes specified attributes of a stored key and can be applied to any key type and key version stored in Azure Key Vault.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The name of the key to delete.

request.description: Deletes a key of any type from storage in Azure Key Vault. The delete key operation cannot be used to remove individual versions of a key.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

request.description: List keys in the specified vault. Retrieves a list of the keys in the Key Vault as JSON Web Key structures that contain the public part of a stored key.

response.name: Successfully returned the list of keys.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

variable.description: (Required) The version of the secret. Use empty string for the latest version.

request.description: Get a specified secret from a given key vault. The GET operation is applicable to any secret stored in Azure Key Vault.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

request.description: Sets a secret in the specified vault. The set operation adds a secret to the Azure Key Vault. If the named secret already exists, Azure Key Vault creates a new version of that secret.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

variable.description: (Required) The name of the secret to delete.

request.description: Deletes a secret from a specified key vault.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

request.description: List secrets in the specified vault. The Get Secrets operation applies to the entire vault. However, only the base secret identifier and its attributes are provided in the response.

response.name: Successfully returned the list of secrets.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).

request.description: Creates a new certificate. If this is the first version, the certificate resource is created. This operation requires the certificates/create permission.

response.name: Accepted. The certificate create operation is pending.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).
Whether to include certificates that are not fully provisioned.

request.description: List certificates in the specified vault. Retrieves information about all certificates stored in the vault.

response.name: Successfully returned the list of certificates.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

query.description: Maximum number of results to return in a page (1-25).
Whether to include certificates that are not fully provisioned.
